productDisplayName: Van Heusen Men Black and Brown Reversible Belt
description: Style NoteYou know you can trust van heusen when it comes to sharp formal essentials that help make the right board room impression. When the brand comes up with belts, now that's the cherry on top of a fantastic formal ensemble. Classy, elegant yet minimalistic (the mood of the moment) style this belt with a tonal pair of shoes!Product DetailsSmooth textured belt, brown on one side and black on the otherHas a tang clasp which you can pull and twist to change belt colourHas holes to customise the FitMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
